item.title: SIM Card Data Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SIM Card Data Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Card Data Recovery Application
(Utilities)
SIM Card Data Recovery application is capable to regain lost entire sim card information including phone book number, IMSI (International mobile subscriber identity)number, card identification number, service provider name etc from mobile phone sim card. www.repairmemorycard.com offers data restoration tool that is used to recover deleted text messages, contact numbers that lost due to various reasons including virus attack, human error, software crashed or other from mobile phone sim card storage. www.repairmemorycard.com provides facility for downloading data recovery software to revive messages that stored in inbox/outbox folder from mobile phone sim card. SIM Card Data Recovery program is able to regain missing contact name, sender number with details without any error from mobile sim card.

[read more]
item.description:
SIM Card Data Recovery Application
(Utilities)
SIM Card Data Recovery application is capable to regain lost entire sim card information including phone book number, IMSI (International mobile subscriber identity)number, card identification number, service provider name etc from mobile phone sim card. www.repairmemorycard.com offers data restoration tool that is used to recover deleted text messages, contact numbers that lost due to various reasons including virus attack, human error, software crashed or other from mobile phone sim card storage. www.repairmemorycard.com provides facility for downloading data recovery software to revive messages that stored in inbox/outbox folder from mobile phone sim card. SIM Card Data Recovery program is able to regain missing contact name, sender number with details without any error from mobile sim card.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SIM Card Data Recovery Application
(Utilities)
SIM Card Data Recovery application is capable to regain lost entire sim card information including phone book number, IMSI (International mobile subscriber identity)number, card identification number, service provider name etc from mobile phone sim card. www.repairmemorycard.com offers data restoration tool that is used to recover deleted text messages, contact numbers that lost due to various reasons including virus attack, human error, software crashed or other from mobile phone sim card storage. www.repairmemorycard.com provides facility for downloading data recovery software to revive messages that stored in inbox/outbox folder from mobile phone sim card. SIM Card Data Recovery program is able to regain missing contact name, sender number with details without any error from mobile sim card.

[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Data Restoring Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Data Restoring Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Data Restoring Program
(Utilities)
www.repairmemorycard.com provides best solution to repair formatted and corrupted pictures from MMC, SDHC and xD card in minimal time. Best and reliable card recovery technology is easy to use for novice to get back lost digital pictures from memory card using mobile phones in cost-effective manner. Browse card recovery program to get back lost pictures documents due to software virus in mobile computer memory card successfully. Simple to use memory card recovery tool in PC which repairs erased picture due to disaster strike in MMC card successfully. Convenient and reliable memory card recovery tool rescue deleted picture due to formatted SDHC plus card in simple procedure. Advanced card recovery software regains accidentally file deletion from micro SD and XD picture card in few mouse clicks. Cost-effective recovery program of memory card runs on latest Windows OS to repair deleted files in doc, ppt, txt, pdf and html formats from SD card in minimal time. Advanced Memory Card Repair program saves valuable birthday photos wedding images erased from XD picture card in simple process. New recovery software for sd card revives suddenly lost jpg, gif, png and jpeg images from CF card in minimal time.Feature*Advanced memory card recovery program restores accidentally file deletion from mobile phone memory card successfully.*Easy to use recovery software for memory card which rescue lost images from MMC, SDHC and mini SD card in minimal time.*Windows based card recovery tool repairs data deleted due to software virus in PC, SD, CF and XD picture card successfully.* Automatic memory card recovery utility salvage deleted files in pdf, html, ppt, txt and doc formats successfully.*New recovery program for MMC card restores deleted images video clips from SDHC plus card in simple steps.

[read more]

item.title: Formated Camera Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Formated Camera Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Formated Camera Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Digital Camera Data Repair Software is the best program for mass salvage of damaged pictures, snaps, photos from removable media storage in completely safe mode without any change in quality or format. Now apply scanning techniques and start restoring missing or inaccessible files and folders like photographs, images, snapshots from any type of point or shoot camera in effective manner. Digital Camera Data Repair Software is the best and cheapest choice for you to get back your lost pictures, images, audio, video clips without any loss or degradation in data quality occurs. With the photo recovery tool, user repair lost videos files and folders.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Picture Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Picture Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Picture Recovery Application
(Utilities)
www.repairmemorycard.com provides easy to operate Picture Repair Software that uses advanced deep disk scanning techniques for searching lost photographs and other files. Widely used pictures restoration application supports all major data storage devices including hard disk, micro SD memory card, removable pen drive, media players and flash drives. Now easily download innovative Picture Repair Software from company website www.repairmemorycard.com that easily restores inaccessible photos that deleted at the time of hard disk partition or due to formatting and save recovered files at user specified safe location.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Portable Digital Camera Photo Repair Software helps user to retrieve accidently missed unforgettable photographs, songs, images, pictures etc from formatted digital camera storage media. Professional image files regaining application provides perfect solution to restore deleted precious image files from latest digital camera devices by using advanced scanning technology. Use trial version of photo recovery software that helps user to retrieve accidently erased valuable picture albums from camcorders disk.

item.title: Unlim Cloud [File Management]
item.itunes:title: Unlim Cloud [File Management]
item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Unlim Cloud
(File Management)
UnlimCloud Desktop app is a unofficial application that provides unlimited cloud storage for your files, utilizing Telegram as the storage solution. The app is built using Tauri and is available on GitHub. With UnlimCloud, you can log in using your Telegram ID and start storing your files without worrying about storage limits.

[read more]
item.description:
Unlim Cloud
(File Management)
UnlimCloud Desktop app is a unofficial application that provides unlimited cloud storage for your files, utilizing Telegram as the storage solution. The app is built using Tauri and is available on GitHub. With UnlimCloud, you can log in using your Telegram ID and start storing your files without worrying about storage limits.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Unlim Cloud
(File Management)
UnlimCloud Desktop app is a unofficial application that provides unlimited cloud storage for your files, utilizing Telegram as the storage solution. The app is built using Tauri and is available on GitHub. With UnlimCloud, you can log in using your Telegram ID and start storing your files without worrying about storage limits.

[read more]

item.title: Sokoban SG [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:title: Sokoban SG [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:author: green7
item.itunes:summary:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* 5 Level Set File Formats; Sokoban (txt, sok, lvl, LP0), XSokoban (xsb)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export
* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Complete Customizable Interface; dockwidgets, transp color, skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]
item.description:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* 5 Level Set File Formats; Sokoban (txt, sok, lvl, LP0), XSokoban (xsb)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export
* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Complete Customizable Interface; dockwidgets, transp color, skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* 5 Level Set File Formats; Sokoban (txt, sok, lvl, LP0), XSokoban (xsb)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export
* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Complete Customizable Interface; dockwidgets, transp color, skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: Rootcloak [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Rootcloak [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: wisp
item.itunes:summary:
Rootcloak
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
RootCloak is an app that lets you hide the root status of your Android device so other apps won't detect it as being rooted.
In the dynamic world of Android customization and optimization, users often seek ways to enhance their device's capabilities. Rooting, a process that grants users elevated privileges, is one such practice that provides extensive control over Android devices. However, the open nature of the Android ecosystem also brings concerns about privacy and security. This is where the RootCloak Magisk module steps in—a tool designed to conceal your device's rooted status, allowing you to enjoy the benefits of root access without compromising your privacy.

Understanding RootCloak:

RootCloak is a Magisk module that operates within the Magisk framework, a popular and powerful tool for rooting Android devices. Unlike conventional root-hiding apps, RootCloak integrates seamlessly with Magisk, offering a more robust and reliable solution for concealing your device's rooted status.

Features and Functionality:

Stealth Mode:
RootCloak works by creating a virtual environment for selected apps, making them unaware of the root access on your device. This stealth mode enables you to use apps that would otherwise detect and restrict usage on rooted devices.
Compatibility:
One of RootCloak's strengths lies in its compatibility with a wide range of applications. It can effectively hide root from banking apps, security-sensitive apps, and various other services that typically detect root access as a security risk.
Magisk Integration:
Being a Magisk module, RootCloak leverages the capabilities of Magisk, which is known for its systemless approach to rooting. This integration ensures a seamless and efficient hiding process without modifying the system partition, reducing the risk of triggering security checks.
Installation Process:

Magisk Installation:
Before using RootCloak, you need to have Magisk installed on your rooted device. Magisk provides a modular and systemless approach to rooting, allowing users to install modules like RootCloak without altering the system partition.
RootCloak Module Installation:
Once Magisk is set up, you can install the RootCloak Magisk module through the Magisk Manager app. After installation, a device reboot is usually required for the changes to take effect.
Usage and Configuration:

App Selection:
RootCloak allows users to select specific apps for which root access should be hidden. This flexibility ensures that you can tailor the hiding mechanism to suit your needs, avoiding conflicts with apps that are root-friendly.
Module Updates:
Regular updates to the RootCloak module ensure compatibility with new apps and security measures. Keeping the module up to date through the Magisk Manager app is essential for maintaining its effectiveness.
Considerations and Limitations:

Root Access Risks:
While RootCloak provides a layer of privacy, users should be aware that some apps enforce security measures for a reason. Bypassing these measures might expose your device to potential risks, so it's crucial to use RootCloak responsibly.
App Updates:
Updates to apps might include improved security features or detection methods. Users should monitor the effectiveness of RootCloak after app updates and ensure the module is compatible with the latest versions.
Conclusion:

RootCloak, nestled within the Magisk ecosystem, offers Android users a valuable tool for maintaining privacy while enjoying the benefits of root access. By seamlessly integrating with Magisk, RootCloak provides a robust solution to conceal your device's rooted status, allowing you to use a broader range of apps without compromising security. As with any root-related modifications, users should exercise caution, stay informed about updates, and use such tools responsibly to strike a balance between customization and security.
[read more]
item.description:
Rootcloak
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
RootCloak is an app that lets you hide the root status of your Android device so other apps won't detect it as being rooted.
In the dynamic world of Android customization and optimization, users often seek ways to enhance their device's capabilities. Rooting, a process that grants users elevated privileges, is one such practice that provides extensive control over Android devices. However, the open nature of the Android ecosystem also brings concerns about privacy and security. This is where the RootCloak Magisk module steps in—a tool designed to conceal your device's rooted status, allowing you to enjoy the benefits of root access without compromising your privacy.

Understanding RootCloak:

RootCloak is a Magisk module that operates within the Magisk framework, a popular and powerful tool for rooting Android devices. Unlike conventional root-hiding apps, RootCloak integrates seamlessly with Magisk, offering a more robust and reliable solution for concealing your device's rooted status.

Features and Functionality:

Stealth Mode:
RootCloak works by creating a virtual environment for selected apps, making them unaware of the root access on your device. This stealth mode enables you to use apps that would otherwise detect and restrict usage on rooted devices.
Compatibility:
One of RootCloak's strengths lies in its compatibility with a wide range of applications. It can effectively hide root from banking apps, security-sensitive apps, and various other services that typically detect root access as a security risk.
Magisk Integration:
Being a Magisk module, RootCloak leverages the capabilities of Magisk, which is known for its systemless approach to rooting. This integration ensures a seamless and efficient hiding process without modifying the system partition, reducing the risk of triggering security checks.
Installation Process:

Magisk Installation:
Before using RootCloak, you need to have Magisk installed on your rooted device. Magisk provides a modular and systemless approach to rooting, allowing users to install modules like RootCloak without altering the system partition.
RootCloak Module Installation:
Once Magisk is set up, you can install the RootCloak Magisk module through the Magisk Manager app. After installation, a device reboot is usually required for the changes to take effect.
Usage and Configuration:

App Selection:
RootCloak allows users to select specific apps for which root access should be hidden. This flexibility ensures that you can tailor the hiding mechanism to suit your needs, avoiding conflicts with apps that are root-friendly.
Module Updates:
Regular updates to the RootCloak module ensure compatibility with new apps and security measures. Keeping the module up to date through the Magisk Manager app is essential for maintaining its effectiveness.
Considerations and Limitations:

Root Access Risks:
While RootCloak provides a layer of privacy, users should be aware that some apps enforce security measures for a reason. Bypassing these measures might expose your device to potential risks, so it's crucial to use RootCloak responsibly.
App Updates:
Updates to apps might include improved security features or detection methods. Users should monitor the effectiveness of RootCloak after app updates and ensure the module is compatible with the latest versions.
Conclusion:

RootCloak, nestled within the Magisk ecosystem, offers Android users a valuable tool for maintaining privacy while enjoying the benefits of root access. By seamlessly integrating with Magisk, RootCloak provides a robust solution to conceal your device's rooted status, allowing you to use a broader range of apps without compromising security. As with any root-related modifications, users should exercise caution, stay informed about updates, and use such tools responsibly to strike a balance between customization and security.
[read more]

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

In the dynamic world of Android customization and optimization, users often seek ways to enhance their device's capabilities. As with any root-related modifications, users should exercise caution, stay informed about updates, and use such tools responsibly to strike a balance between customization and security.
[read more]
